titleStmt.title: SII 15.672: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 672. (B.K. No. 106 of 1926-27.) KALLŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Kallappa temple.

This is dated the cyclic year Plavaṅga, Mārgaśira śu. 15. The details cannot be verified. It records the gift of the village Kallūr or Kallāpura in Muḷugunda-vaḷita to Bommaṇaiya for the benefit of the god Huttada Mallikārjuna of Gēkinakaṭṭe by Chavuḍi Kadamba-nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
* © namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trayilōkhya nagarāraṁbhamūla
stāṁbhāya śāṁbhavē . śvasti samasta sakaladēvatāvistāraka śrī kayilāśapurava
rādhīśvara vasiṣṭa vālmīki Atri Āgira pulasta kāsyapa mā¨rkkaṁḍēya naṁdādi pramukha muni
nikarapūjitā naṁdikēśvara ghaṁṭāka¨rnnapramukhapracaṁḍagaṇaparivēṣṭitā bhāradvāja viśvāmi
tra gautama gā¨rghya nārada brugu Upamanyu dū¨rvvāśamuninikaravaṁdyā śivavaṁ¨rmmana manō
virājita trayilōkyabhuvanabhavanādhīśvara paraṁdhāmahastābhyastita Anaṁtā¨rkkatēja prabhākara
mū¨rtti Anipama gana . Analasōmā¨rkkatāppatanumū¨rtti samastadēvara cakra va¨rtti jaṭājūṭa ku
ṭīrabhārahariviriṁcidānavamānavadīkṣesikṣerakṣakapratipālaka paṭupaṭahaninādaḍhama
rugāḍaṁbarā gajāsuraca¨rmmāṁbara śihvāsanābhiṣiktamastaka stitadanujamanujakulāṁ taka du
rita vidhvaṁśata madōṁnmattatamukhavijruṁbhitanarasihyamū¨rtti suṁbhavijruṁbhitatrijagasaṁ
hāramū¨rtti pū¨rvvasamudramēkhaḷāvaḷeya dakṣaṇasamudrasaraśvatīkaṁṭhābharaṇa pa
ścimasamudra mauḷimāṇikya Uttarasamudravividhōttuṁgaraṁmyaha¨rṁmmyamaṇidīpaka ja
gatrayapradīpaka surēśvara Asurēśvara bhūtēśvara śrīmanmahādēva huttada mallikā¨rjuna dē
vara varasiddhi heṁgenalu baraḍige hayanu kuruḍage kaṁṇu baḍavarugaḷa baḍatanava bīsu
va jaḍarugaḷāni¨rddhara jaḍanuva keḍisuva druḍhacittaru bēḍitta kuḍuha mṛḍanu niṁdaka
rige ni¨rddhuvṛthāma vaṁdakarige varavanīva baṁjege makkaḷu vaṁjakarige bēḍittanīva kuṁja
rāṁbaradhara raṁjipa paravādigaḷa mastakāsūla varavillā yaṁbarige gaṁṭalige gāṇa yiṁ
du vara Uṁṭṭu nāḷe varavillā yaṁba saṁdēhigaḷa bāya biyyaga kuṁdu koṟate yānī trahi
hi yaṁdu baṁdavara salahuva śrī giriyādhīśvara śivanaṁ mana prāṇaliṁga gēkinakaṭe
ya mahattu mallikā¨rjunadēvarige plavaṁgasaṁvatsarada mā¨rggaśira śu 15 llu śrīmatu
cauḍi kadaṁbanāyakaru muḷuguṁdada vaḷita kalūra grāmavanu gēkinakaṭṭeya hutade mallikā
¨rjunadēvarige koṭa paṭṭaya kramaveṁteṁdaḍe © nāU naṁma kallura grāmavanu niṁma gē
kinakaṭeya hutada mallikā¨rjunadēvara nayivēdyake Ā grāmavanu koṭeU Ā kallāpu
ravanū tuṁbsikoṁḍu hola maneya sāgisikoṁḍu Alliya koḍavāru muṁtādadanū
māḍisikoṁḍu mallikā¨rjunadēvara nayivēdyake māḍikoṁḍu sukhadalu nīU jaṁga mā¨rca
naya māḍi boṁmaṁṇaiyyanu bhōgisodu stānamāṁnya pū¨rvvama¨ryyāda Eṁdu nāU naṁmmi
śṭānuruciyiṁda Āḍaṁ . biṭṭu koṭa paṭi namage dha¨rṁmmavāgabēku Eṁdu nāU Ā grāmava
nu puravā¨rgavāgi koṭeU koṭahaṁtā kallāpurau yābhūmi caṁdranuḷḷallipariyaṁta
ralu naḍayabēku Eṁdu nāU koṭevāgi yī dha¨rmmake Ārobbaru tappidavarige tāU mā
ḍidāhaṁthā dha¨rmmahāni Eṁdu koṭa śāsana © bahubhiḥ ¨rvasudhā bōtvā rājabhiḥ ssa
gharādhibhiḥ yasyayasya Edā bhūmi tasya tasya taḷā phaḷaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō
harēti vaśuṁdharā śaṣṭi¨rvvaruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ © © yiṣṭaramē
le Aḷupidare ghōranaraka tappadu .
Digital edition of SII 15.672 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
